title: Optimized Features Lite
description: Optimizes your game to the maximum, without adding any unnecessary mods. The lite version of Vanilla Optimized.
body:
![The big logo of the modpack. It says 'Optimized Features Light'. 'Optimized' has light blue glazed terracotta as an background and 'Features' has an red background. 'Lite' has a green color. The 'i' in 'Optimized' also has an outstanding dot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09c81f26298a1db2dcab4ebcd15afc48c7cb46d.png)

## Introducing Optimized Features Lite!
Explore the unparalleled Minecraft optimization modpack! Encounter seamless gameplay, lightning-quick loading speeds, and a performance surge that will elevate your gaming experience to new heights! This modpack is purely optimizational, so you can experience maximum FPS.
## Why Optimized Features Lite?
Optimized Features Lite is the lite version from [Optimized Features](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimized-features).
The goal of this modpack is to make the game playable for players who have potato PCs and for players who want to use shaders.
## Works Anywhere
This modpack works anywhere because all the mods are client side. You can even use this modpack in different launchers.
## Support or Issues?
If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful [Discord](https://discord.gg/XGxBGrJjkA).
##
### Thanks
Big thanks to [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably) for some mods used in this modpack.

- Cloth Config API
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
